subcodes.first_line: O lamp of the love of God! In the blessed verse He proclaimeth that, like unto the radiance of the lamp, the delicacy of the glass, and the purity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مصباح محبت الله در ایه مبارکه میفرماید چون نورانیت مصباح و لطافت زجاجه و صفای
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism of color and light, @Manifestation of God as sun, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
